title: Journey D — Crisis Event
description: Crisis event detected by review-responder or community-manager. Tier 1 = immediate escalation, Tier 2 = within 2h, Tier 3 = next business day

tier.description: Crisis tier: 1=immediate escalation, 2=within 2 hours, 3=next business day

recommended_action.description: Recommended action (e.g., 'respond on platform', 'issue public statement', etc.)

escalation_contact.description: Who should be escalated to (jefe-marketing, ceo, pr-manager, etc.)
